_comment: openspec task 3.3 — Elasticsearch index mapping for image-search. Apply with: PUT /<index> with this body. Assumes the 768-d nomic-embed-vision-v1.5 / nomic-embed-text-v1.5 shared space (design Decision 2). If a higher-dim model wins the eval, bump dims (3584 requires ES >= 8.11) and re-create the index. dense_vector + cosine + HNSW. Vectors are L2-normalized by the service, so dot_product would also be valid.
